description: OIDC discovery against the REAL Google well-known doc returns issuer=accounts.google.com + a jwks_uri
OIDC discovery against the REAL Microsoft well-known (a tenant + common) returns the v2.0 issuer + jwks_uri
Preset resolution: microsoft + tenant id -> correct v2.0 issuer + discovered JWKS + default subject_claim; google -> fixed issuer + well-known JWKS
addTrustedIdp via the microsoft preset stores resolved issuer/jwks/subject_claim and kind='microsoft'
Mock-IdP preset round-trip: register via 'microsoft' preset pointed at a mock discovery doc -> agent token validates + dispatches (reuses the Phase-2 live E2E harness)
Admin UI happy path: pick Microsoft, enter tenant id, save -> issuer/JWKS auto-fill, the IdP appears in the list
Reuse: a tenant with an existing Microsoft connection sees a pre-filled Entra tenant id suggestion
Hosted: Google + Microsoft are trusted with no explicit registration; PRM advertises them as authorization_servers
Regression: 'custom' kind still works with raw issuer/jwks/audience/claim (Phase-2 parity)
Subject-claim: a Microsoft preset defaults to azp; a duplicate (issuer, subject) returns a friendly error
